action.reasoning: Observation: Iteration 18 successfully continued training CLIP ViT-B/16 for 5 additional epochs (total 8 epochs) at reduced LR 5e-5, starting from the 23.28% checkpoint. Best source validation accuracy improved to 79.25% (EMA). Training took ~68 minutes. We have ~1.48 hours (~89 minutes) and 12 iterations remaining. Analysis: The model is improving on source validation without catastrophic forgetting so far, but we must measure target-domain Quickdraw accuracy immediately to determine whether longer fine-tuning improves or degrades OOD generalization. Decision: Submit the newly trained checkpoints/clip_8ep.pt for evaluation right now to obtain the 8-epoch Quickdraw baseline. Based on the result and remaining time, I can then decide whether to train further, ensemble checkpoints, or stop.
